image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Bright ice reflects sunlight; dark water absorbs it. What happens next?
Context visual: This is called the albedo effect. More ice means less absorption, keeping our planet cool.
Escalation visual: But as ice melts, dark oceans emerge, soaking up heat. The cycle begins.
Evidence visual: Research shows that this albedo feedback accelerates warming. It’s a tipping point.
Payoff visual: Melting ice isn't just a loss; it fuels a hotter future for all of us.
Cta visual: Stay informed and take action. Follow for more insights on climate science!
